plugin.name: YouTubeMusic
plugin.title: YouTube Music
plugin.desc: Browse, search, and stream YouTube Music to your Squeezebox players.
plugin.changes: Fixed radio track titles and artist names showing as raw video IDs. Fixed garbled bullet characters in Squeezer. Fixed radio triggering correctly — fires once when queue empties, resets after 5 minutes to allow future radio sessions.
plugin.creator: schmij97
